Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.params.ZParams

  • Packages that use ZParams 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.params
    This package contains the classes that represent optional parameters of core Redis commands.

    • Uses of ZParams in redis.clients.jedis

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis with parameters of type ZParams 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Response<Set<byte[]>> TransactionBase.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Set<byte[]> Jedis.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys)
      Intersect multiple sorted sets, This command is similar to ZINTERSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
      CommandObject<Set<byte[]>> CommandObjects.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Set<byte[]> UnifiedJedis.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Response<Set<byte[]>> MultiNodePipelineBase.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Response<Set<byte[]>> Pipeline.zinter(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Response<Set<String>> TransactionBase.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys) 
      Set<String> Jedis.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys)
      Intersect multiple sorted sets, This command is similar to ZINTERSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
      CommandObject<Set<String>> CommandObjects.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys) 
      Set<String> UnifiedJedis.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys) 
      Response<Set<String>> MultiNodePipelineBase.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys) 
      Response<Set<String>> Pipeline.zinter(ZParams params, String... keys) 
      Response<Long> TransactionBase.zinterstore(byte[] dstkey, ZParams params, byte[]... sets) 
      long Jedis.zinterstore(byte[] dstkey, ZParams params, byte[]... sets)
      Creates a union or intersection of N sorted sets given by keys k1 through kN, and stores it at dstkey.
      CommandObject<Long> CommandObjects.zinterstore(byte[] dstkey, ZParams params, byte[]... sets) 
      long UnifiedJedis.zinterstore(byte[] dstkey, ZParams params, byte[]... sets)

      Response<Long> Pipeline.zinterstore(byte[] dstkey, ZParams params, byte[]... sets)

      Creates a union or intersection of N sorted sets given by keys k1 through kN, and stores it at dstkey.

      Add multiple sorted sets, This command is similar to ZUNIONSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
